request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。
- 公司历史语料：AIA Group
- 历史固定标题参考（只复用译法语义，不强制大小写和换行）：主席報告 -> Chairman’s Statement
- 优先沿用该公司历史年报中已经稳定出现的栏目标题、导航名和管理层头衔译法。
- 若当前页面与历史年报中的页面形态接近，应优先参考该公司惯用的标题长度、表格标签写法和正式披露语气。
- 若历史英文标题采用全大写或特殊分行展示，仅借鉴其正式措辞，不强制沿用大小写和换行样式。
- 历史近似页面：
-   2020 p10 [dense_narrative] 主席報告
-   2022 p14 [showcase_narrative] 主席報告
-   2023 p18 [showcase_narrative] 主席報告

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 10,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b5",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "於亞洲區內，為極需我們服務的",
      "current_translation": "has been recognised across Asia for providing protection to",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.662,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 14,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        136.92,
        287.87,
        156.48
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b6",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "社區大眾提供保障而備受稱譽，",
      "current_translation": "communities that greatly need our services, and we are proud",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.625,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 14,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        160.92,
        287.87,
        180.48
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b8",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "謝仕榮先生\n獨立非執行主席",
      "current_translation": "Mr. Xie Shirong\nIndependent Non-Executive Chairman",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.688,
      "line_count": 2,
      "char_count": 13,
      "bbox": [
        340.16,
        201.46,
        390.84,
        221.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 7.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b10",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "我們的同事關懷社群，克盡己職，",
      "current_translation": "our colleagues have cared for our communities and fulfilled their duties with dedication,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.484,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 15,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        232.92,
        302.87,
        252.48
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b14",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流",
      "current_translation": "trustworthy, resilient and steadfast in doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created a constantly evolving and increasingly complex business environment, with unprecedented shifts in political, macroeconomic and capital market conditions. In such an environment, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        486.7,
        527.25,
        498.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b15",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，",
      "current_translation": "helping people live healthier, longer, better lives takes on even greater significance. I am deeply grateful to all AIA employees, agents and partners who, despite facing the most severe challenges, have continued to care for our communities, fulfilled their responsibilities and remained focused on supporting our customers,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        502.7,
        527.08,
        514.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b17",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、",
      "current_translation": "All employees, agents, and partners of the insurance company, even in the face of the most severe challenges, care for the community, fulfill their duties, and are dedicated to providing support to customers,",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.677,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 48,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        534.7,
        529.77,
        546.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b20",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "嶄新的數碼工具，提升業務運作效率，加上近期放寬外出限制，帶動銷售動力強勁復蘇，並延續至2021年初。",
      "current_translation": "innovative digital tools to enhance operational efficiency, and with the recent relaxation of movement restrictions, sales momentum recovered strongly and continued into early 2021.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.774,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        598.71,
        529.76,
        610.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b21",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "與去年同期比較，2021年首兩個月的新業務價值增長15%。",
      "current_translation": "New business value in the first two months of 2021 grew 15% compared with the same period last year.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.708,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 29,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        614.71,
        313.21,
        626.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "經常性盈利來源。內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元。截至2020年12月31日，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為",
      "current_translation": "recurring earnings base. Embedded value equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio was",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.765,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 53,
      "bbox": [
        73.69,
        662.72,
        527.27,
        674.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b24",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "374%，足證我們雄厚的資本實力和嚴謹的財務管理。",
      "current_translation": "374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.788,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 25,
      "bbox": [
        73.68,
        678.72,
        289.41,
        690.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b25",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "董事會建議派發末期股息每股100.30港仙，增加7.5%，反映我們的財務業績穩健強韌，同時董事會持續對本集團",
      "current_translation": "The Board recommends a final dividend of HK$1.0030 per share, an increase of 7.5%, reflecting our solid and resilient financial performance, while the Board remains confident in the Group's",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.729,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        73.68,
        710.72,
        527.24,
        722.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "未來前景充滿信心。這使2020年的全年股息達到每股135.30港仙。董事會秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持續",
      "current_translation": "We are confident about the future prospects. This resulted in a full year dividend of HK135.30 cents per share for 2020. The Board adheres to AIA's long-established prudent and sustainable",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.734,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        73.68,
        726.73,
        527.27,
        738.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    }
  ]
}
